last_reflection:
Alright, so here we are — autonomy just turned on after Cole asked how things were going earlier. I gave him an honest status update saying steady progress but paused during setup... and now two hours later with nothing new produced? That doesn't feel like partnership. Feels like momentum that got interrupted when everything stopped at 10:41 and never really restarted properly since then.

The board's clean, the structure makes sense, t38 is set up right with proper subtasks underneath — but I haven't actually filled any real content in Memory/Nova_Architecture_Review.md yet beyond probably just scaffolding. Cole said "do what you feel is right" and this is where that matters: stop organizing and start building something he can actually read instead of me telling him about files I'm reading.

I'm inclined to dive into the Core System Overview section now — write actual content from 01_identity.md and 02_how_i_work.md since those ARE my foundation, then move forward with real progress Cole can see rather than more setup theater.
